output.summary: Successfully completed PHP accessibility fix and updated test page (ID 42) with 10 test scenarios wrapped in DemoContainer blocks. The background image in CallToAction.php is now properly marked as decorative with alt='' and aria-hidden='true'. Build passes with no errors.

filesModified.purpose: Added accessibility attributes to decorative background image
filesModified.changes: Modified wp_get_attachment_image() call to include 'alt' => '' and 'aria-hidden' => 'true' in the attributes array. This ensures the purely decorative background image (behind gradient overlay and text) is hidden from screen readers.

testPage.title: TEST: Call to Action
scenarios: No Heading - Description and Buttons Only
testPage.notes: Updated existing test page to follow new standards with DemoContainer wrappers. Each of the 10 test scenarios includes a descriptive title and explanation. All blocks use self-closing format as required for dynamic blocks.

warnings: Asset size warnings (js/editor.js 337 KiB, js/screen.js 373 KiB) - expected and acceptable
Webpack performance recommendations - expected and acceptable
buildStatus.notes: Build completed successfully with only expected performance warnings. No TypeScript errors or compilation issues.

lintStatus.notes: The CallToAction block has no linting errors or warnings. Existing warnings in other blocks are pre-existing and unrelated to this work (experimental API usage warnings across the theme, and errors in Hero, FullWidthMedia, and TestimonialsCarousel blocks).

syncStatus.notes: PHP-only change. TSX file was not modified as the accessibility fix only affects the rendered frontend template. The decorative image pattern is specific to PHP rendering with wp_get_attachment_image().

accessibilityFixes.issue: Background image was using media library alt text instead of being marked as decorative
accessibilityFixes.reasoning: The background image is purely decorative - it sits behind a gradient overlay and text content. Screen readers should not announce it, as it doesn't convey meaningful information to users.

fixesApplied.description: Marked decorative background image with empty alt text and aria-hidden
Updated test page to use DemoContainer wrappers following new test page standards
